ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the data was collected */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data entry */,
  "usage_kwh" REAL /* Energy usage in kilowatt-hours (kWh) */,
  "cost_dollars" REAL /* Cost of energy usage in dollars ($) */,
  "high_temp" INTEGER /* Highest temperature recorded during the hour */,
  "low_temp" INTEGER /* Lowest temperature recorded during the hour */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "cost_per_kwh" REAL /* Cost per kilowatt-hour */,
  "estimated_savings" REAL /* Estimated savings from energy-saving measures */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the building */,
  "total_area_sqm" REAL /* Total area of the building in square meters (sqm) */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the building */,
  "constructed_date" TEXT /* Date when the building was constructed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last energy audit or inspection */,
  "insulation_type" TEXT /* Type of insulation used in the building */,
  "heating_system_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system used in the building */,
  "cooling_system_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system used in the building */,
  "solar_panel_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of solar panels installed, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the energy source is used */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., electricity, gas, solar) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the source is the primary energy source for the building */,
  "capacity_kwh" REAL /* Capacity of the energy source in kilowatt-hours */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy supplier */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the energy supply contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the energy supply contract */,
  "renewable_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of energy from renewable sources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_sources_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition entry */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building where the data was collected */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data entry */,
  "high_temp" INTEGER /* Highest temperature recorded during the hour */,
  "low_temp" INTEGER /* Lowest temperature recorded during the hour */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity recorded during the hour */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded during the hour */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation recorded during the hour */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "solar_elevation_angle" REAL /* Solar elevation angle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., building manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions or access levels of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building the data pertains to */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
